seo.crop.title: Free Online Image Cropper — Crop JPG, PNG, WebP by Pixels or Ratio | Tool Box Nova
seo.crop.description: Crop images online for free with three precision modes: free-form drag, fixed aspect ratios (1:1, 4:3, 16:9), or exact pixel dimensions. Batch process up to 30 images, preserve lossless quality, no file upload required — 100% browser-based.
seo.crop.keywords: crop image online, image cropper, crop photo free, online crop tool, crop jpg png webp, batch crop images
seo.to_jpg.title: Free Online Image to JPG Converter — PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG to JPG | Tool Box Nova
seo.to_jpg.description: Convert PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, SVG and TIFF to JPG online for free. Adjustable quality slider (1–100%), batch convert up to 30 files, transparent backgrounds auto-fill white. All processing in browser, no upload required.
seo.to_jpg.keywords: convert to jpg, png to jpg, webp to jpg, gif to jpg, svg to jpg, image to jpg converter free
seo.jpg_to.title: Free Online JPG Converter — Convert JPG to PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP | Tool Box Nova
seo.jpg_to.description: Convert JPG to PNG (lossless), WebP (25–35% smaller), GIF or BMP instantly in your browser. Batch convert up to 30 files, adjustable WebP quality, one-click ZIP download. No upload, no account.
seo.jpg_to.keywords: jpg to png, jpg to webp, jpg converter, jpeg to png, convert jpg format, free image converter
seo.editor.title: Free Online Photo Editor — Adjust Brightness, Contrast, Saturation | Tool Box Nova
seo.editor.description: Edit photos online for free with real-time adjustments: brightness, contrast, saturation, sharpness and blur. Live Canvas preview, non-destructive editing, batch apply same settings to multiple photos. Export as JPG, PNG or WebP.
seo.editor.keywords: online photo editor, adjust brightness contrast, photo enhancement tool, image editor free, saturation sharpness blur
seo.remove_bg.title: Free AI Background Remover — Remove Image Background Online | Tool Box Nova
seo.remove_bg.description: Remove image backgrounds instantly using AI WebAssembly technology running entirely in your browser. Sub-pixel precision on hair, fur and complex edges. Output transparent PNG — no upload, no account, no per-image fee.
seo.remove_bg.keywords: remove background free, AI background remover, transparent background, remove image background, background eraser online
seo.watermark.title: Free Online Image Watermark Tool — Add Text or Logo Watermark | Tool Box Nova
seo.watermark.description: Add custom text or logo watermarks to images online for free. 9-point position grid, adjustable opacity, tile mode for full coverage. Batch watermark up to 30 photos, download as ZIP. No upload to server.
seo.watermark.keywords: add watermark to image, image watermark free, text watermark, logo watermark, photo watermark online
seo.rotate.title: Free Online Image Rotator — Rotate & Flip JPG, PNG, WebP | Tool Box Nova
seo.rotate.description: Rotate images by any angle (−360° to 360°) and flip horizontally or vertically. PNG/WebP transparency preserved through rotation. Batch process up to 30 images, no file upload required.
seo.rotate.keywords: rotate image online, flip image, rotate photo free, image rotation tool, rotate jpg png webp, flip photo online
seo.hash.title: Free Hash Generator — MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, HMAC Online | ToolboxNova
seo.hash.description: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, and HMAC hashes instantly. Supports text and file input. 100% client-side — your data never leaves your browser.
seo.hash.keywords: MD5 generator, SHA256 online, hash calculator, HMAC SHA256, file hash, SHA512 generator

seo.base64.description: Encode or decode Base64 instantly. Supports text, files up to 50MB, Base64URL, and MIME line splitting. All processing happens in your browser.

seo.url_encode.description: Encode or decode URLs using encodeURIComponent or RFC 3986 standard. Supports batch processing, difference highlighting, and real-time conversion.
